head.title: Ryan's listening, podcasts and morning radio

outline.title: Social Work Stories
outline.description: Real practice, told honestly. The one I bring case-relevant episodes from to the cohort.

outline.title: The Happiness Lab
outline.description: Plays on the drive between home visits when the day has been heavy.

outline.title: Hidden Brain
outline.description: Saved for Sunday afternoons after church when the pot roast is on.

outline.title: Fresh Air
outline.description: The long interview format. Good for the kitchen while cooking.

outline.title: Public Radio Morning News
outline.description: On low in the quiet kitchen at 5:30 before the kids are up.
